assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && Number.isInteger(data.refinement_count) && Number.isInteger(data.section_count) && data.clarifications_json && data.clarifications_json.version === '1' && data.clarifications_json.metadata && Number.isInteger(data.clarifications_json.metadata.question_count) && Array.isArray(data.clarifications_json.sections)
